psybeam.description: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

psyblade.description: If the current terrain is Electric Terrain, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5.

psychic.shortDescription: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
psychic.description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

psychicfangs.shortDescription: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
psychicfangs.description: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

psychicnoise.shortDescription: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
psychicnoise.description: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.

psychicterrain.description: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain. During the effect, the power of Psychic-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Psychic type, Nature Power becomes Psychic, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Psychic Terrain.

psychoboost.shortDescription: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
psychoboost.description: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

psychocut.description: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

psychoshift.shortDescription: Transfers the user's status ailment to the target.
psychoshift.description: The user's non-volatile status condition is transferred to the target, and the user is then cured. Fails if the user has no non-volatile status condition or if the target already has one.

psychup.shortDescription: Copies the target's current stat stages.
psychup.description: The user copies all of the target's current stat stage changes.

psyshieldbash.shortDescription: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
psyshieldbash.description: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

psyshock.shortDescription: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
psyshock.description: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.

psystrike.shortDescription: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
psystrike.description: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.

psywave.shortDescription: Random damage equal to 0.5x-1.5x user's level.
psywave.description: Deals damage to the target equal to (user's level) * (X + 50) / 100, where X is a random number from 0 to 100, rounded down, but not less than 1 HP.
